Properties.commandText:
SELECT `p`.`idPoint` AS `PointId`, `p`.`tag` AS `TagName`, `a`.`eventTime` AS `Timestamp`, `a`.`value` AS `Value`
FROM `analogevents` AS `a`
INNER JOIN `points` AS `p` ON `a`.`points_idPoint` = `p`.`idPoint`
WHERE ((`a`.`points_idPoint` = 471) AND (`a`.`eventTime` >= @__start_1)) AND (`a`.`eventTime` <= @__end_2)
